text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the final day of summer camp and Satono
Diamond appears to be lost in thought.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I was thinking about the future.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There's only two months left until the Kikuka Sho.
I wonder how much I can improve in that time.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I still don't think I've gained the kind of
overwhelming, jinx-defying strength I seek.
choice_data_list: We have two whole months to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spent summer camp focusing on the
fundamentals, but we'll begin training for the
Kikuka Sho in earnest from here on out.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I know that you don't see immediate
results from training, but I can't help feeling
impatient.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can't let something so trivial shake me up,
though! I won't lose to a jinx! I'm going to win
without a doubt!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I've got a grip on myself again! I'm going to
push myself even harder in preparation for the
race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The anxiousness she's feeling must be driven by
her intense desire to win the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her enthusiasm does feel somewhat
forced and excessive. I really hope it doesn't end
up hindering her progress...
